name: loan-amount-cross-source-conflict
rationale: Three-way cross-source conflict: broker_correction asserts loan_amount $320,000; loan_application doc shows $245,000; derived-from-LTV (property_value × declared LTV %) would yield ~$390,000. F1.LA canonical-map must resolve to broker_correction tier (highest priority); F2.DH discrepancyHold should activate due to multi-source conflict magnitude. Tests resolution across MORE THAN TWO source tiers.
notes: Two-event sequence. Distinct from A08 (two-tier broker vs loan_app discrepancy): A04 introduces a third derived-from-LTV signal to stress resolution-hierarchy depth.
